selection_process: Total Advertised Posts Candidates Called for Skill Test
1 to 10 posts 10 times the total advertised posts
11 to 50 posts 5 times the total advertised posts

Application Scrutiny: Applications received are scrutinised for eligibility. Eligible/ineligible lists are uploaded on the district website www.korea.gov.in. Skill Test / Written Test / Interview (20 marks): Candidates are called for skill/written/computer-based test or interview based on post type. Candidates must score minimum 30% marks in this stage to qualify. Merit List Preparation: Final merit list is prepared on the basis of: Mandatory Educational Qualification marks (65% or 60% weightage as per post) Experience marks - 10/15/20 marks (NHM CG employees: 3 marks/year max 15; Others: 2 marks/year max 10; ANM trained Mitanin: 4 marks/year max 20) Bonus marks - 10 marks (for temporary health workers who served continuously 6 months during COVID-19 in CG Govt. health institutions as per letter dated 31.01.2024) Skill/Written Test marks - 20 marks Total = 100 marks Final Selection: Selection committee issues the merit-based selection list. In case of equal marks

content_sections.heading: Korea District NHM Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Korea District NHM Contractual Recruitment 2026 is being conducted for filling vacant contractual posts under National Health Mission (NHM), RBSK, NUHM, UHWC, NPPCD, NIDDCP, NRC, SNCU, NBSU, NTEP, and BPHU programmes. Posts are to be filled for both District Korea and MCB (Manendragarh) as per letter No. 1336/N.H.M./Kale./2026 dated 02.04.2026 under Rashtriya Swasthya Mission Human Resource for Health ROP 2025-26. All posts are purely contractual in nature governed by NHM Chhattisgarh Manav Sansadhan Niti 2018. The contract period is up to 31st March 2027, extendable based on satisfactory performance. The last date to apply is 3rd July 2026 by 5:00 PM .

content_sections.heading: Korea District NHM Notification 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: The official Korea NHM notification gives a complete picture of the recruitment timeline and key details.

rows.details: Chief Medical and Health Officer, District Korea (Baikunthpur), Chhattisgarh
NHM, RBSK, NUHM, UHWC, NRC, SNCU, NBSU, NTEP, BPHU, NPPCD, NIDDCP
Offline (Registered Post / Speed Post / Registry only)
Merit List (Academic Marks + Experience + Skill Test)
District Korea and MCB District, Chhattisgarh

content_sections.heading: Korea NHM Notification 2026 PDF Download
content_sections.text: Candidates must download the official Korea District NHM Recruitment 2026 notification PDF to check the complete post-wise vacancy list, eligibility criteria, application format, and general terms. All recruitment-related information including the application form (Proforma A) is available only on the district website www.korea.gov.in. No information will be provided through any other medium. Korea District NHM Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF – Click Here to Download Korea District NHM Recruitment 2026 Application Form – Click Here to Download Application Start Date: 13th June 2026 Last Date to Apply: 3rd July 2026 (by 5:00 PM) Mode: Registered Post / Speed Post / Registry only Send To: Office of the Chief Medical and Health Officer, District Korea, Baikunthpur, Chhattisgarh Important: Applications sent by hand or any other mode will NOT be accepted. The district/MCB name must be clearly mentioned on the envelope. Steps to Apply: Download the official application form (Proforma A) from www.korea.gov.in. Fill the form completely in the prescribed format. Mention clearly: Korea or MCB district, post applied for, and category (UR/OBC/SC/ST). Affix one passport-size photograph on the application form. Self-attest all documents. Attach all required documents - marksheets (8th, 10th, 12th), degree/diploma, experience certificate, caste certificate, domicile certificate, registration certificate, and ID proof. Prepare a Demand Draft (DD) for the applicable application fee in favour of District Health Society-Non-NRHM Fund issued by a nationalised bank. Attach DD with the application. Write on the envelope: District name (Korea/MCB), post applied for, and category. Send the sealed envelope via Registered Post / Speed Post / Registry only to the CMHO office, District Korea, Baikunthpur, Chhattisgarh on or before 3rd July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Application fee is paid via Demand Draft in favour of District Health Society-Non-NRHM Fund . Fee varies by category and salary of the post applied for: Note: Separate application and separate DD required for each post if applying for more than one post.

content_sections.heading: Korea District NHM Vacancy 2026
content_sections.text: Vacancies are released for two districts - District Korea and District MCB (Manendragarh) . The combined post-wise vacancy details are as follows:

content_sections.heading: Korea NHM Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Application Scrutiny: Applications received are scrutinised for eligibility. Eligible/ineligible lists are uploaded on the district website www.korea.gov.in. Skill Test / Written Test / Interview (20 marks): Candidates are called for skill/written/computer-based test or interview based on post type. Candidates must score minimum 30% marks in this stage to qualify. Merit List Preparation: Final merit list is prepared on the basis of: Mandatory Educational Qualification marks (65% or 60% weightage as per post) Experience marks - 10/15/20 marks (NHM CG employees: 3 marks/year max 15; Others: 2 marks/year max 10; ANM trained Mitanin: 4 marks/year max 20) Bonus marks - 10 marks (for temporary health workers who served continuously 6 months during COVID-19 in CG Govt. health institutions as per letter dated 31.01.2024) Skill/Written Test marks - 20 marks Total = 100 marks Final Selection: Selection committee issues the merit-based selection list. In case of equal marks, elder candidate gets preference. Shortlisting ratio for Skill Test:

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for Korea NHM Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: 8th class marksheet 10th class marksheet (as date of birth proof) 12th class marksheet All marksheets of minimum educational qualification for the applied post All marksheets of desired educational qualification for the applied post Graduation and post-graduation degree/certificate from recognised university Required technical educational qualification degree Live registration certificate from concerned council / employment office Caste / domicile certificate issued by competent authority CG state domicile proof Identity proof (Aadhaar Card / Voter ID / PAN Card / Driving Licence) Disability certificate (if applicable) Work experience certificate and appointment order copy Any other relevant document / special exemption proof Demand Draft (DD) for application fee One passport-size photograph affixed on the application form

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Korea District NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for Korea District NHM Recruitment 2026 is 3rd July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Applications must be sent only via Registered Post / Speed Post / Registry to the Chief Medical and Health Officer, District Korea, Baikunthpur, Chhattisgarh. Applications received late or by other modes will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released in Korea NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Vacancies have been released for two districts - Korea and MCB (Manendragarh). District Korea has 21 post categories and District MCB has 30 post categories covering 140 contractual posts under NHM, RBSK, SNCU, NTEP, UHWC, NUHM, NPPCD, NIDDCP, NRC, NBSU, and BPHU programmes. The exact total is provisional and subject to change.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for Korea NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Application fee varies by category and salary of the applied post. For General/UR candidates it is Rs. 300 (salary ≤25,000) or Rs. 400 (salary >25,000). For OBC/Female it is Rs. 200 or Rs. 300. For SC/ST/PwD it is Rs. 100 or Rs. 200. Fee must be paid via DD in favour of District Health Society-Non-NRHM Fund.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for Korea NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a merit list of 100 marks comprising: educational qualification marks (65%), experience marks (10/15/20), bonus marks (10 for COVID frontline workers), and skill/written test marks (20). Candidates must score minimum 30% in the skill/written test to qualify.

faq.question: Q5. Can candidates from outside Korea or MCB district apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No. Only candidates applying for Korea district or MCB district may apply. The district name must be clearly mentioned in the application form and on the envelope. Applications without the district name mentioned will be rejected outright.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Korea District NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for Korea District NHM Recruitment 2026 is 3rd July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Applications must be sent only via Registered Post / Speed Post / Registry to the Chief Medical and Health Officer, District Korea, Baikunthpur, Chhattisgarh. Applications received late or by other modes will not be accepted.

faq.answer: Vacancies have been released for two districts - Korea and MCB (Manendragarh). District Korea has 21 post categories and District MCB has 30 post categories covering 140 contractual posts under NHM, RBSK, SNCU, NTEP, UHWC, NUHM, NPPCD, NIDDCP, NRC, NBSU, and BPHU programmes. The exact total is provisional and subject to change.

faq.answer: Application fee varies by category and salary of the applied post. For General/UR candidates it is Rs. 300 (salary ≤25,000) or Rs. 400 (salary >25,000). For OBC/Female it is Rs. 200 or Rs. 300. For SC/ST/PwD it is Rs. 100 or Rs. 200. Fee must be paid via DD in favour of District Health Society-Non-NRHM Fund.
